The Collective

Meet the muralists, stencil artists, and visionaries transforming Tampa Bay.

Alex "Aero" Rivera

Muralist

Specializing in large-scale photorealistic murals and urban decay aesthetics.

Spray Paint Portraits

Sarah Jenkins

Street Artist

Bold geometric patterns intersecting with organic flora elements.

Stencils Abstract

Marcus Wright

Installation

3D mixed media installations blending found objects with neon accents.

Mixed Media Lighting

PAC

Connecting muralists, street artists, and public artists with paid opportunities. For artists, by artists.
